summary: Completed comprehensive testing of VitalFlow gamification, billing, and premium lock features. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend features working correctly including gamification stats bar, premium lock banner, NudgeCard with follow-nudge integration, upgrade button, and corporate welcome message.

backend: GET /api/billing/plan - Free plan with limits for B2C personal
GET /api/predictive/alert - locked=true for Free B2C users
Login corporate returns company_name in AuthResponse
Corporate user plan has full access
Free user plan has limited access
frontend: Gamification Stats Bar visible on Dashboard (Pontos de Energia + Streak)
GamificationBar in Navbar shows points and streak
Toast notification shows +50 points after following nudge
Button changes to 'Concluido' after following nudge
Premium Lock Banner visible for Free B2C users
Premium Lock Banner disappears after upgrade

seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during testing (test_free_*, test_corp_*, test_lock_*, test_upgrade_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All gamification, billing, and premium lock features are working correctly. Backend uses HttpOnly cookies for auth (withCredentials: true). Corporate domains are seeded: brisanet.com.br, vitalflow.com, emergent.sh. POST /api/billing/upgrade is MOCKED (no real Stripe). Leaderboard returns {entries: [...], period: 'all_time'} format.
